name: stp
description: Your CTO in a plugin. 7 skills, stack-aware, pace-aware, code-graph-aware. Universal across web / CRM / C++ / C# / Rust / game cheats / embedded / mods. Opus 4.7 plans, Sonnet 4.6 executes. Aider-style repo map bundled — zero network, zero paid APIs. Built on STP's production philosophy: no mocks, no placeholders, real tests.
